zh.lifeSummary: Alice Heylesdon是John Heylesdon的女兒，於大約1355年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可韋斯特 巴爾善姆。她於1409年7月21日之後與Sir John Wiltshire結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1433年享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Heylesdon was born about 1355, in West Barsham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John Heylesdon. She married Sir John Wiltshire after 21 July 1409. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1433, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Heylesdon est née environ 1355, à West Barsham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de John Heylesdon. Elle a épousé Sir John Wiltshire après 21 juillet 1409. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1433, à l’âge de 80 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Heylesdonは約1355年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウエスト バーシャムでJohn Heylesdonの娘として生まれた。1409年7月21日以後にSir John Wiltshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1433年に80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Heylesdon(은)는 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨스트 바샤에서 John Heylesdon의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1409년 7월 21일 이후 Sir John Wiltshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1433년 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Heylesdon родилась около 1355 г. в местности вест баршам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John Heylesdon. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wiltshire после 21 июля 1409 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1433 г. в возрасте 80 лет.
